334.title: Fame Kills
334.description: The case of a young woman who follows her dream by moving to Las Vegas to become a showgirl, but her dreams turn into a grisly nightmare.

454.title: Fame Kills
454.description: A girl from a small town heads to Hollywood hoping to make the leap from model to movie star, but after landing her first major role, she disappears without a trace.

498.title: Fame Kills
498.description: When a young actress from the Pacific Northwest moves to Los Angeles to become a star, her dreams turn to nightmares when evil knocks on her door.

539.title: Fame Kills
539.description: The case of an aspiring country singer on the verge of a recording contract who goes missing after traveling to Nashville to record a demo.

580.title: Fame Kills
580.description: The case of an aspiring actress who beat out hundreds of women to win the starring role in a feature film, but is then found murdered.

7079.title: Fame Kills
7079.description: A beautiful young woman who grew up in the suburbs of Los Angeles is determined to be a star but while trying to make connections in Hollywood, she ends up in the sights of a deadly serial killing duo.
